_comment: Curated allow-list for the catalog. Run scripts/sync-skills.py to (re)generate skills.json. 'name'+'summary'+'use_when' are pulled from each skill's SKILL.md frontmatter unless overridden here. Everything else (ref/tags/repo/install/status) is set here.
